name: Gemini 1.0 Ultra
archDisplay: Dense Transformer decoder with multi-query attention
note: Google's first frontier model; launched Gemini Advanced ($19.99/mo Google One AI Premium) on Feb 8 2024; now shut down (404s).

results.notes: First model to exceed human-expert baseline on MMLU (CoT@32)

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Gemini Advanced ($19.99/mo Google One AI Premium, giving access to Ultra 1.0) launched 2024-02-08, corroborated by 9to5google and TechCrunch. Fetched blog.google/technology/ai/google-gemini-ai/ directly: it literally states 'With a score of 90.0%, Gemini Ultra is the first model to outperform human experts on MMLU' -- exact quote confirms the 90 score and the note verbatim.
